name: AANA Runtime Connector
description: Optional OpenClaw agent tools that send planned agent events and workflow checks to a user-configured local AANA bridge.

bridgeBaseUrl.description: Base URL for a trusted local AANA bridge. Must resolve to a loopback host.

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout for AANA bridge calls.

bridgeToken.description: Optional bearer token for the local bridge. Prefer host-managed secret configuration.

requireExplicitBridgeBaseUrl.description: Keep enabled so each deployment intentionally configures the bridge endpoint.
